Interface ImmutableCharBooleanMapFactory

All Known Implementing Classes:
ImmutableCharBooleanMapFactoryImpl
public interface ImmutableCharBooleanMapFactory
A factory which creates instances of type ImmutableCharBooleanMap. This file was automatically generated from template file immutablePrimitivePrimitiveMapFactory.stg.
Since:
4.0.
